description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, these leather slippers from ganuchi are a perfect addition to your wardrobe.UpperSoft, wide leather straps with a toe separator to hold the foot in placeSoft leather footbed with brand name embossed on the heel for all-day comfortOutsoleTextured durable rubber outsole for absolute grip on smooth surfacesshoe careUse a branded leather conditioner Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
